case_title: THE DIAMOND CUTTING CENTER VS EAST BAY CASH REGISTER EXCHANGE INC.

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION AUG-18-1995, CONTINUANCE ORDERED PER REQUEST TO SEP-14-1995 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT C
